title: Account Work Schedule and Weekends for a 4 day work week
excerpt: I have several clients that are moving to a 4 day work week. And I love the new feature for Work Schedule where we can assign teams to a schedule. But I that feature currently only updates the Workload feature. I need th…

posts.author: AmyMorrow (Amy Morrow)
posts.cookedHtml: I have several clients that are moving to a 4 day work week. And I love the new feature for Work Schedule where we can assign teams to a schedule. But I that feature currently only updates the Workload feature. I need that feature to also update the Gantt and Calendar features.

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Love this feature request, and its great to hear that more companies are moving to this! Half our company is already on a 4 day work week, so would be awesome to have this customisable functionality.

posts.author: AmyMorrow (Amy Morrow)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! Please vote for it

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: Yesss! I need this! I will want more integration on this as well, for example, with the formulas for workdays! And that if I have to choose a single date or to start a cronogram in a bank holiday, that it let me know at least marking it in red or something that it is a public holiday!

posts.author: Michaleiba (Michal Leiba)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I am Michal from the spot-nik team (Do you know of our best selling apps SuperForm and SuperMail?). We just launched a new app- SuperPlanner with it you can set any type of days off and as many types as you’d like. I believe it answers your needs.

Try it now for free-

https://auth.monday.com/oauth2/authorize?client_id=a72397016954aa33e272936988566142&response_type=install

Let me know what you think
